comments.comment:
Road dust emissions, which account for the majority of emissions, were increased over 2011 which is consistent with the increase in high wind days in the year as seen in the MET data.
The PM emissions from the Aux boiler Natural Gas combustion have been added.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Road dust emissions, which account for the majority of emissions, were increased over 2011 which is consistent with the increase in high wind days in the year as seen in the MET data.
Emissions from Aux Boiler Natrual Gas combustion have been added to the inventory.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less reduction in emissions than expected due to higher NOx emission rate in 2011. Higher rate is due to increased operation at low loads.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Consistent with similar natural gas usage from previous year which makes up the majority of fuel used. Large reduction in use of residual fuel oil which accounted for a slight reduction in emissions since oil only makes up a small percentage of the fuel used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reduction is consistent with reduced generation (using Residual Fuel Oil).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in emissions consistant with increase in ash production.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Road dust emissions, which account for the majority of emissions, were greatly reduced which is consistent with the reduction in high wind days per year as seen in the MET data.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The facility consumed significantly lower quantities of fuel oil relative to previous years resulting in a significant reduction in the quantity of Ash generated.  This has resulted in a reduction in the disposal of all substances via ash landfilling.
The facility did not meet the NPRI MPO threshold quantity for cadmium.   Emissions are included for consistancy with previous years reporting.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility updated the methodology used to calculate emissions from natural gas resulting in an increase in the estimated emissions of cadmium to air.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The facility burned significantly less Fuel oil than in 2009 resulting in a significant reduction in the quantity of ash produced.  This has resulted in the significant reduction in the quantity of D/F being released via ash landfilling.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reduction in D/F releases is consistant with the reduction in generation and the increased proportion of Natural Gas vs Fuel Oil used.  Natural Gas produces less D/F than Fuel Oil combustion.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Road dust emissions which account for the majority of emissions were unchaged, but stack emissions were significantly lower due to reduction in oil usage.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated source testing of water discharge results in no detectable level of Cd in water discharge.  Increased proportion of Fuel load in 2006 was Natural Gas which generates less Cd to Air than Oil.
